concepts.title: Curves and surfaces in R^3
concepts.blurb: Embedded geometry starts with curvature, normals, and local parametrizations.

concepts.title: First/second fundamental forms
concepts.blurb: Metric and shape operator encode intrinsic and extrinsic geometry of surfaces.

concepts.title: Gauss map and shape operator
concepts.blurb: The unit-normal map n: S → S^2 has differential dN_p = −S_p, the self-adjoint shape operator whose eigenvalues are the principal curvatures and whose determinant is the Gaussian curvature.

concepts.title: Gaussian curvature and geodesics
concepts.blurb: Curvature and geodesic flow govern local shape and shortest paths.

concepts.title: Gauss–Bonnet theorem
concepts.blurb: Total Gaussian curvature of a closed oriented surface is 2πχ(S): curvature is pinned to topology, with a local version tying K, geodesic curvature, and exterior angles to 2π.
